summary: Comprehensive testing of newly implemented e-commerce features: Payment Gateway toggle, Admin Notification Email, Image uploads, Enhanced Product Detail Page, and Mega Menu with subcategories. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@gpgt.ae / admin123 works correctly
Admin Settings page - Payment Gateway card visible with ENABLED/DISABLED badge
Admin Settings - Online Payment (Stripe) toggle switch functional
Admin Settings - Admin Notification Email field visible and working
Admin Settings - Cash on Delivery (COD) toggle visible
Admin Settings - Save Settings button functional
Admin Products page - Upload Images button visible in product form
Admin Products page - Paste image URL input field available
Admin Products page - Product Images section with dashed drop zone
Image upload API requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
Image upload API works with admin token - returns URL
Uploaded images can be retrieved via /api/uploads/{filename}
Product Detail Page - Trust badges visible (Free Delivery, Secure Payment, Authentic Product, After-Sales Support)
Product Detail Page - Product Highlights section with checkmarks
Product Detail Page - Description tab with What is Included section
Product Detail Page - Specifications tab with UAE-relevant specs
Product Detail Page - Delivery tab with UAE delivery info
Product Detail Page - FAQ section with 5 expandable questions
Product Detail Page - Add to Cart and Buy Now buttons functional
Mega menu showing subcategories on hover over All Categories
Navigation showing Hardware instead of Plumbing in main nav
Hardware dropdown shows 16 subcategories (SS Bolt and Nut, Door Lock, etc.)
All categories in mega menu have relevant subcategories
critical_code_review_comments: Payment Gateway toggle implementation is well-designed with visual feedback (ENABLED/DISABLED badge)
Image upload supports both file upload and URL paste methods - good UX
Product detail page has comprehensive UAE-market features (VAT inclusive pricing, delivery info)
Mega menu with subcategories provides excellent navigation experience
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data - admin@gpgt.ae / admin123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Payment Gateway toggle in admin settings with ENABLED/DISABLED status, 2) Admin Notification Email field, 3) Image uploads in product form (file upload + URL paste), 4) Enhanced product detail page with trust badges, highlights, specifications, FAQ, 5) Mega menu with subcategories for all categories, 6) Navigation shows Hardware instead of Plumbing.

features_verified.payment_gateway_toggle: PASS - Visible with ENABLED/DISABLED badge, toggle functional
features_verified.admin_notification_email: PASS - Input field visible and accepts values
features_verified.image_upload_button: PASS - Upload Images button visible in product form
features_verified.image_url_paste: PASS - Paste image URL input field available
features_verified.product_detail_highlights: PASS - Product Highlights section with checkmarks
features_verified.product_detail_specifications: PASS - Specifications tab with 7 spec items
features_verified.mega_menu_subcategories: PASS - Subcategories shown in mega menu
features_verified.hardware_in_navigation: PASS - Hardware replaces Plumbing in main nav
